blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,835 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
